title: Tuesday
content:
Another morning's banners are unfurled - 
    Another day looks smiling on the world.
    It holds new laurels for thy soul to win;
    Mar not its grace by slothfulness or sin,
        Nor sad, away,
         Send it to yesterday.
meaning:
Ella Wheeler Wilcox's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tuesday"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
